text: So, there's a guy on Twitter that is
just starting to go viral after tweeting
out that he had his phone stolen in

he tracked it to Shenzhen, China, and
now he just so happens to be there. He
decided to walk exactly to where it was
showing up on his Find My iPhone. And
what do you know? He was brought to one

Another guy responded to this tweet
saying, "Can you please pick up my
iPhone, too, while you're there?" So, it
seems like a lot of stolen phones
somehow end up in Shenzhen, China. So
